mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, real_name, id_card, id_card_front, id_card_back, bank_name, bank_card, phone, email, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{idCard}, #{idCardFront}, #{idCardBack}, #{bankName}, #{bankCard}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT p.*, u.username FROM user_profile p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
